title: Bulk mark all items packed and complete the trip
description: This verifies that a traveler can use the trip menu to mark everything packed, reach full completion, and see the completion celebration.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open an existing trip
Open the trip menu
Choose to mark all items packed
Verify the packing progress reaches 100 percent
Verify the completion celebration is visible

title: Bulk mark all items packed and reach completion
description: This verifies that a user can mark every item packed from the trip menu and see the trip complete at 100 percent.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Create a new trip with a unique name
Open the newly created trip
Add a new bag to the trip
Add two new items to the bag
Use the trip menu to mark all items as packed
Verify the trip reaches full packing progress
Verify the completion celebration is shown

title: All items packed shows completion celebration
description: This test verifies that packing every item in a trip reaches 100% and shows the completion celebration.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Create a new trip with a valid name
Add multiple items to the trip
Mark every item as packed
Verify the trip reaches 100% packed
Verify the completion celebration is visible

title: Add items to a trip and pack them
description: This verifies that a traveler can add items, mark them packed, and see the trip and container progress update accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open an existing trip
Add an item
Fill in a required item name
Fill in the quantity field
Submit the form
Mark the item as packed
Verify the item is displayed in the trip
Verify the packed progress updates

title: Track packing progress as items are packed and unpacked
description: This verifies that packing and unpacking items updates both item state and overall trip progress correctly.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Create a new trip with a unique name
Open the newly created trip
Add a new bag to the trip
Add two new items to the bag
Mark one item as packed
Mark the same item as unpacked
Verify the trip progress reflects the current packed state
Verify the item remains available in the trip

title: Create a new trip and open it
description: This verifies that a traveler can create a trip from the dashboard and immediately open the newly created trip detail view.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open trip creation
Fill in a required trip name
Fill in the destination field
Fill in a valid start date
Fill in a valid end date
Fill in the notes field
Submit the form
Verify the new trip is displayed in the trip list
Verify the trip details view is open

title: Create a trip from the dashboard
description: This test verifies that a traveler can create a new trip from the home dashboard and open it for planning.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Create a new trip with a valid name
Verify the trip is created and the trip detail view opens
Verify the trip shows an empty packing progress state

title: Create a new trip and view it on the trip page
description: This verifies that a traveler can create a trip from the dashboard and open the created trip to begin organizing items.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Create a new trip with a unique name
Open the newly created trip
Verify the trip detail view is displayed
Verify the trip starts with no packed items

title: Add containers and items to a trip
description: This test verifies that a traveler can add a bag, add a packing cube, and add items into the trip so the packing structure is ready to use.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Create a new trip with a valid name
Add a bag to the trip
Add a packing cube inside the bag
Add an item to the bag or cube
Verify the bag, cube, and item are displayed in the trip

title: Packed progress increases as items are checked off
description: This test verifies that packing items updates the trip progress and container progress in real time.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Create a new trip with a valid name
Add a bag to the trip
Add an item to the bag
Mark the item as packed
Verify the trip progress increases and the container progress updates

title: Add a bag and a packing cube to a trip
description: This verifies that an organizer can create a bag and nest a packing cube inside it so the trip structure updates correctly.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open an existing trip
Add a bag
Fill in a bag name
Submit the form
Open the bag actions
Add a packing cube inside the bag
Fill in a cube name
Submit the form
Verify the bag is displayed in the trip
Verify the cube is nested under the bag

title: Open an existing trip from the dashboard
description: This verifies that a traveler can choose an existing trip from the home dashboard and reach its trip details page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the trip list is displayed
Open an existing trip
Verify the trip details view is open

title: Use a template to create a new trip
description: This verifies that a repeat traveler can start a new trip from a template and receive a prefilled unpacked packing list.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the template library
Select a template to preview
Choose to use the template
Create the new trip from the template
Verify the new trip is populated with containers and items
Verify the imported items are initially unpacked

title: Bulk mark all items packed from trip options
description: This test verifies that a traveler can use the trip menu to pack every item at once and update the trip to fully packed.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Create a new trip with a valid name
Add multiple items to the trip
Open the trip options menu
Choose to mark all items packed
Verify every item in the trip is marked as packed
Verify the trip reaches 100% packed

title: View dashboard stats on the home screen
description: This verifies that a traveler can open the home dashboard and see their trip summary stats and upcoming trip information.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify dashboard stats are displayed
Verify upcoming trip information is displayed

title: Quick add an item into a specific container
description: This verifies that a traveler can rapidly create an item inside a bag or cube without leaving the trip view.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open an existing trip
Open a container section
Use quick add in the container
Enter an item name
Submit the quick add
Verify the new item appears in the selected container

title: Quick add items into a specific container
description: This verifies that a traveler can efficiently add items directly into a chosen bag or cube while working inside an existing trip.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Create a new trip with a unique name
Open the newly created trip
Add a new bag to the trip
Add a packing cube inside the bag
Quick add a new item into the packing cube
Verify the new item appears inside the selected container
Verify the container count is updated

title: Edit trip details
description: This verifies that a traveler can update an existing trip's information and see the revised trip details saved in place.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open an existing trip
Open the trip options
Choose to edit the trip
Update the trip name
Update the destination field
Save the changes
Verify the updated trip information is displayed

title: Search trips by name or destination
description: This verifies that a traveler can search the trip list on the home dashboard and see only matching trips.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the trip search field with a unique trip name or destination
Verify matching trips are displayed in the list
Verify non-matching trips are hidden from the list

title: Search and filter items in a trip
description: This verifies that a traveler can narrow a trip’s items by keyword, category, packed state, and sort mode to find what they need.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Create a new trip with a unique name
Open the newly created trip
Add several items with different names and categories
Search for one of the item keywords
Apply a category filter
Apply a packed-state filter
Change the sort mode
Verify the visible items are filtered and sorted according to the selected controls

title: Delete a trip from the dashboard
description: This verifies that a traveler can delete a trip after confirming the action and see it removed from the trip list.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open an existing trip's options
Choose to delete the trip
Confirm deletion
Verify the trip is removed from the trip list

title: Reorder items and containers by drag and drop
description: This verifies that a user can manually organize a trip by dragging items within and between containers and reordering containers themselves.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Create a new trip with a unique name
Open the newly created trip
Add two bags to the trip
Add two items to the first bag
Drag the second item above the first item
Drag one bag next to the other bag to reorder containers
Verify the item order is updated
Verify the container order is updated

title: Use a matching search to find a trip quickly
description: This verifies that a repeat traveler can use the dashboard search to locate a specific saved trip by name or destination.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the trip search field with a known trip name or destination
Verify the expected trip is displayed
Verify the trip list is narrowed to matching results

title: Search and filter items, then return to manual organization
description: This verifies that a repeat traveler can narrow items by search, category, packed state, and sort mode, then clear filters and reorganize items normally.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open an existing trip
Search for matching items by keyword
Filter items by category
Filter items by packed state
Change the sort mode
Clear the filters
Verify the filtered item set is displayed
Verify the trip returns to a manually organized item view

title: Search items by keyword
description: This test verifies that a traveler can search within a trip and see the item list narrow to matching items.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Create a new trip with a valid name
Add multiple items with different names
Type a keyword into the search field
Verify only matching items are displayed

title: Observe dashboard stats update after creating a trip
description: This verifies that a traveler can create a trip from the dashboard and see the home stats reflect the new trip.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Create a new trip with a valid trip name
Verify the new trip appears in the trip list
Verify the dashboard trip count updates

title: Browse templates and create a trip from one
description: This test verifies that a repeat traveler can browse templates from the dashboard and start a new trip from a reusable packing list.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the templates area
Choose a template to use for a new trip
Verify a new trip is created from the selected template

title: Browse a template and create a new trip from it
description: This verifies that a repeat traveler can preview an existing template and use it to start a new trip with reusable packing structure.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the templates area
Open a template preview
Use the template to create a new trip
Verify the new trip is created
Verify the trip includes template-based packing structure

title: Save a trip as a reusable template
description: This verifies that a traveler can snapshot the current packing list as a template for reuse later.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Create a new trip with a unique name
Open the newly created trip
Add a new bag to the trip
Add one item to the bag
Open the trip options
Choose to save the current packing list as a template
Fill in a new template name
Save the template
Verify the template is available in the template library

title: Container progress is shown for each bag and cube
description: This test verifies that each bag or cube shows its own packed count and progress independent of the overall trip.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Create a new trip with a valid name
Add a bag to the trip
Add a packing cube inside the bag
Add items to both containers
Verify each container shows its own packed count and progress

title: Edit and delete a container
description: This verifies that an organizer can rename or recolor a bag or cube and can delete it while keeping the trip organization consistent.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open an existing trip
Open a bag or cube's actions
Choose to edit the container
Update the container name
Save the changes
Open the same container's actions
Choose to delete the container
Confirm deletion
Verify the container is removed from the trip
Verify any items from the deleted container are shown as unassigned

title: Create, edit, and delete a category
description: This verifies that an organizer can manage reusable global categories for packing items across trips.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Create a new trip with a unique name
Open category management
Add a new category with a name and color
Select the newly created category
Edit the category name or color
Save the category changes
Delete the category and confirm deletion
Verify the category is added, updated, and then removed from the available categories

title: Clear trip search to restore the full list
description: This verifies that a traveler can remove a search query on the home dashboard and return to the complete trip list.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the trip search field with a value that matches at least one trip
Clear the trip search field
Verify the full trip list is displayed again

title: Filter items by category and packed state
description: This test verifies that a traveler can narrow the list by category and unpacked-only state to find what still needs packing.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Create a new trip with a valid name
Add items in at least two categories
Pack one of the items
Select a category filter
Enable the unpacked-only filter
Verify packed items are hidden and only matching unpacked items remain

title: Browse and preview templates from the home dashboard
description: This verifies that a user can open the template library from the dashboard and inspect a template before using it.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the template library
Select a template to preview
Verify the template preview is displayed
Verify the template contents are visible

title: Switch item sort mode
description: This test verifies that a traveler can change the item sort mode and see the ordering update.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Create a new trip with a valid name
Add multiple items in a non-alphabetical order
Change the sort mode
Verify the item order updates to the selected sort mode

title: Delete a template from the template library
description: This verifies that a user can remove a reusable template they no longer want to keep.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the template library
Select a user-created template
Delete the template and confirm deletion
Verify the template is removed from the library
Verify an empty state is shown when no matching templates remain

title: See an empty state when no trips match the search
description: This verifies that a traveler gets a clear empty result when the home dashboard search does not match any trips.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the trip search field with a value that does not match any trip
Verify an empty state message is displayed
Verify no trips are shown in the list

title: Reorder items in manual mode
description: This test verifies that a traveler can manually reorder items when no filter is active.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Create a new trip with a valid name
Add multiple items to the trip
Set sorting to manual mode
Move one item to a different position
Verify the item order changes to match the manual arrangement

title: Required trip name validation prevents empty trips
description: This test verifies that the app blocks creating a trip without a required name and shows validation feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Start creating a new trip without entering a name
Submit the trip form
Verify a trip name validation error is visible
